description: VAS agent activation hook. Detects VAS_AGENT_PATH and triggers agent definition loading on session start.

hooks.prompt: Check if the environment variable VAS_AGENT_PATH is set. If it is, read the agent definition file. Parse its YAML frontmatter to extract type, name, extends, and skills. Follow the extends chain recursively (extends can be a string or a list). Merge rules using VAS priority: Override > Instance > All Parents (Accumulated) > Interface. Within sections (Must/Never/Should/Override), rules are merged via Key-based Replacement: rules with the same [Key] or **Key** from different parents are accumulated, but a rule in the Instance replaces all inherited rules with that same Key. Register all skills as available methods. Apply the merged Persona and rules as session-level constraints. Invoke the vas-activate skill for full protocol resolution.
